description_long: This is a round, medium-sized bowl with a slightly irregular rim and a deep, concave interior. The exterior surface is matte and dark gray, with visible patches of lighter discoloration and several clear cracks and repairs, suggesting it has been reconstructed from broken pieces. The bowl's walls are moderately thick, and the base is rounded, giving it a stable appearance. There are no visible handles or decorative elements, and the surface texture appears rough and unpolished. The interior is similarly dark and shows signs of wear, with some unevenness and minor chips along the rim. Overall, the bowl has a utilitarian, aged look, likely made from ceramic or clay.
description: A dark gray, roughly textured ceramic bowl with visible cracks and repairs, showing signs of age and wear.
description_view_0: This view highlights the bowl's uneven rim and visible cracks, especially a prominent repair at the top edge.
description_view_1: This angle shows a smoother section of the rim and more of the bowl's rounded base, with fewer visible cracks.
description_view_2: This side displays several vertical cracks and a patch of lighter discoloration on the exterior surface.
description_view_3: This view reveals a large diagonal crack running from the rim to the base, with the surface appearing slightly smoother.
attribute_location: kitchen or outdoor communal eating area
attribute_context_of_use: serving or holding food or ingredients
